description: Five entries with per-entry titles (differing dates and incident names) but the same four ## section headings in the same order and ISO dates throughout — the happy-path matched structure.

entries.content:
# 2026-07-21 — checkout: elevated latency

## What happened
Checkout p99 latency crossed the paging threshold for about nine minutes starting at 14:12 UTC.

## Timeline
At 14:12 the alert fired. 14:15 triage began. 14:24 a rollback was applied. 14:29 latency returned to baseline.

## Resolution
Rolled back the checkout deploy that added a synchronous inventory lookup on the hot path.

## Follow-ups
Add a load test that exercises the inventory lookup before the next checkout release.

# 2026-07-18 — payments-api: elevated error rate

## What happened
payments-api's 5xx rate rose above 2% for roughly twelve minutes after a routine redeploy.

## Timeline
At 09:02 the alert fired. 09:06 triage began. 09:14 the new revision was rolled back. 09:18 the error rate returned to baseline.

## Resolution
Reverted payments-api to the previous revision; the new revision had a missing timeout on its downstream call.

## Follow-ups
Add a default timeout to the payments-api client library so a missing override cannot repeat this.

# 2026-07-12 — search-api: index lag

## What happened
search-api results were stale for about twenty minutes while the indexing pipeline fell behind.

## Timeline
At 16:30 the lag alert fired. 16:34 triage began. 16:48 the indexing worker was restarted. 16:50 lag returned to normal.

## Resolution
Restarted the stalled indexing worker; it had wedged on a malformed document.

## Follow-ups
Add a dead-letter path for malformed documents so a single bad record cannot wedge the worker again.

# 2026-07-05 — inventory: stale cache

## What happened
inventory reported stale counts for about fifteen minutes after a cache invalidation job silently failed.

## Timeline
At 11:05 the discrepancy was reported. 11:09 triage began. 11:18 the cache was flushed manually. 11:25 counts matched again.

## Resolution
Manually flushed the inventory cache; the invalidation job's retry logic had given up too early.

## Follow-ups
Widen the invalidation job's retry window and alert when it gives up.

# 2026-06-29 — ledger-svc: reconciliation delay

## What happened
ledger-svc's nightly reconciliation run finished four hours late, delaying the morning report.

## Timeline
At 02:00 the run was scheduled. 03:40 the run stalled on a lock. 07:50 the lock was cleared. 08:05 the run completed.

## Resolution
Cleared a stale lock left behind by a previous failed run.

## Follow-ups
Add a lock timeout to the reconciliation job so a stale lock cannot block the next run indefinitely.
